title: When a specific person is assigned a subitem, copy the subitem into another specific board
excerpt: I have an Active Projects Board that has subitems where people are assigned to. When a person is assigned to the subitem, I want the automation to copy the subitem to a specific board based on the the specific person tha…

posts.author: nolboomer (Chad Noland)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an Active Projects Board that has subitems where people are assigned to. When a person is assigned to the subitem, I want the automation to copy the subitem to a specific board based on the the specific person that I assigned it to.

Is this currently possible?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Sorry for the late reply! If you’re still looking to set up this workflow, let us know at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help you do this!
